inputs.fcf_source: FY2025 operating cash flow $1930.0M less estimated maintenance capex $180.0M ÷ 260.3M diluted shares per AJG/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20260217_rpt20251231_acc0001628280_26_008662.htm
inputs.normalization_note: FY2025 FCF per share anchors owner cash; AssuredPartners acquisition year distorts GAAP OCF; fiduciary pass-through excluded.

bear.notes: Soft commercial insurance pricing; integration delays; multiple compression

base.notes: Brokerage + risk management organic growth; AssuredPartners cross-sell

bull.notes: Hard market persists; synergy realization; deleveraging

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: Asset-light broker; goodwill from acquisitions is separate from owner-cash engine (10-K FY2025)

option_scan.question: Backlog / contracted revenue not in FCF path?
option_scan.evidence: 85% of commission revenue recognized on effective date; renewal book embedded in growth

option_scan.question: Embedded product option in revenue?
option_scan.evidence: $3.56B annualized revenue acquisition; separate assured_partners_integration_option component

growth_explanation.mechanism: Brokerage and risk-management commission growth from insured exposure, policy rates, and tuck-in M&A; partially offset by integration costs and higher interest expense
growth_explanation.bear_falsifier: Combined segment organic revenue growth falls below 3% for four consecutive quarters
growth_explanation.bull_falsifier: AssuredPartners EBITDAC margin lift exceeds plan with net debt paydown

component_valuation.coverage_statement: Four additive components map brokerage/risk-management owner cash, AssuredPartners integration option, net financial claims, and integration/leverage reserve once each.

valuation.evidence: Primary bridge from AJG/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20260217_rpt20251231_acc0001628280_26_008662.htm: FY2025 revenue $13942.0M, OCF $1930.0M, FCF $1750.0M, cash $1155.0M, total debt $13513.0M; contract backfill 2026-07-21.
valuation.cross_check: Reconcile to FY2025 10-K before decision use.
valuation.falsifier: Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.

inputs.label: FY2025 net cash provided by operating activities
FY2025 estimated maintenance capital spending

source.locator: Property, plant and equipment depreciation $206M; maintenance capex estimated at $180M

inputs.label: FY2025 diluted shares (net income / diluted EPS)
FY2025 brokerage segment revenue before reimbursements

source.locator: Brokerage segment revenue before reimbursements $8,024M FY2025

inputs.label: FY2025 risk management segment revenue before reimbursements

source.locator: Risk management segment revenue before reimbursements $4,195M FY2025

assumptions.label: Normalized owner free cash flow per diluted share
assumptions.rationale: FY2025 operating cash flow less estimated maintenance capex per diluted share; fiduciary pass-through cash excluded from owner cash.

assumptions.label: Growth years 1–5
assumptions.rationale: Lawrence bear/base/bull owner-cash growth from valuation.json.

assumptions.label: Growth years 6–7
assumptions.rationale: Fade as brokerage market matures and integration completes.

assumptions.label: Required return on owner cash
assumptions.rationale: Levered serial acquirer bounds; not the stance gate.

assumptions.label: Selling multiple in year 7
assumptions.rationale: Lawrence exit multiples 20× / 24× / 28× on year-7 cash path.

assumptions.label: Component schedule adjustment factor
assumptions.rationale: Preserves component schedule while filing facts anchor FY2025 FCF per share.

valuation.evidence: Primary bridge from AJG/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20260217_rpt20251231_acc0001628280_26_008662.htm: FY2025 revenue $13942.0M, OCF $1930.0M, FCF $1750.0M, cash $1155.0M, total debt $13513.0M; contract backfill 2026-07-21.
valuation.cross_check: Reconcile to FY2025 10-K before decision use.
valuation.falsifier: Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.

trigger.policy: A complete economic-value analysis is required when any trigger fires; otherwise it is recommended.

economic_claim.description: One diluted share of AJG, including brokerage/risk-management owner cash, AssuredPartners integration upside, net financial claims, and integration reserve.
economic_claim.enterprise_to_equity_reconciliation: Consolidated brokerage engine valued through owner-cash discount on FY2025 FCF per share; AssuredPartners option, net liquidity, and integration reserve are separate overlap keys.

economic_value_analysis.accounting_reference: FY2025 10-K: stockholders' equity $23.3B; economic value in normalized owner cash ($6.723/sh), not GAAP book alone.

component_groups.label: Brokerage and risk-management owner-cash engine
component_groups.economic_claim: Normalized free cash flow from brokerage and risk-management segments
component_groups.valuation_basis: Owner-cash discount on FY2025 FCF per diluted share.
component_groups.adjustments: Fiduciary pass-through excluded; maintenance capex estimated from depreciation.

component_groups.label: AssuredPartners integration and synergy option
component_groups.economic_claim: Incremental cross-sell and EBITDAC lift from AssuredPartners acquisition
component_groups.valuation_basis: Risk-adjusted milestone value on integration upside.
component_groups.adjustments: Not in Lawrence base FCF path; $3.56B annualized revenue at close.

risk_and_timing.probability_basis: Base ~35% that integration delivers planned cross-sell; low case zero.
risk_and_timing.timing_basis: Synergy realization over 2–4 years per FY2025 10-K acquisition disclosures.
risk_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: Integration capex and earnouts funded from operating cash and debt.

component_groups.label: Net cash and debt claims on common equity
component_groups.economic_claim: Net corporate liquidity after short-term borrowings, long-term debt, and operating minimum
component_groups.valuation_basis: Net asset value on filing-locked cash less debt.
component_groups.adjustments: Fiduciary cash excluded; net debt ~$12.4B at FY2025.

component_groups.label: Integration, earnout, and leverage stress reserve
component_groups.economic_claim: AssuredPartners integration risk and interest-expense step-up stress
component_groups.valuation_basis: Bounded negative reserve; not full enterprise value haircut.
component_groups.adjustments: Interest expense $639M FY2025 (+68% YoY) caps partial dhando.

component_review_queue.decision_rule: Each assigned rater records accept, challenge, or reject with a proposed range and evidence. The aggregator may not silently average disputed ranges.

items.label: Brokerage and risk-management owner-cash engine
mandatory_checks: Is the valuation method appropriate for this economic claim?
Is the security's ownership claim and economic-unit denominator reconciled correctly?
Does the evidence support the low/base/high range and its timing?
Are comparable assets truly like-for-like after production, contract, location, capital, ownership, and realization adjustments?
For an option, are success probability, time to realization, and remaining owner-funded capital explicit?
Is the component additive, or already embedded in another component?
What observation would move the base estimate materially?

valuation_method_route.label: High-return compounder
failure_modes: growth projected without its capital cost
terminal value unsupported by a durable mechanism
valuation_method_route.decision_rule: Use one primary method and no more than two corroborating methods; irrelevant methods and personas remain silent.

probability_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: Integration capex and earnouts funded from operating cash and debt.

method_route.label: High-return compounder
failure_modes: growth projected without its capital cost
terminal value unsupported by a durable mechanism
method_route.decision_rule: Use one primary method and no more than two corroborating methods; irrelevant methods and personas remain silent.

valuation.interpretation: value_per_share is withheld while any material additive component is unpriced; priced_components_per_share is not a complete security value.

scenario_contract.rule: Cases must change cited causal operating, capital, probability, timing, or financing drivers—not only a terminal multiple.

top_value_drivers.label: Net cash and debt claims on common equity
Integration, earnout, and leverage stress reserve

source_lineage.locator: Property, plant and equipment depreciation $206M; maintenance capex estimated at $180M
Brokerage segment revenue before reimbursements $8,024M FY2025
Risk management segment revenue before reimbursements $4,195M FY2025

falsifiers: Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.
Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.
Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.
Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.
required_refresh_triggers: new filing or material operating update

change_control.rule: A source fact is locked. Every assumption change requires a reason, author, timestamp, and before/after value.

universal_valuation_contract.decision_rule: No security is decision-grade until every material claim is valued exactly once by a valid calculation proof and every material evidence blocker is resolved.

paths.label: Growth theory (pre-falsifier)
paths.weight_why: Segment blend before falsifier pass; diagnostic only when it differs from falsifier-adjusted.
weight_falsifiers: Included at full weight alongside falsifier-adjusted without divergence note

paths.label: Bear scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Downside stress; low weight because bear is a sensitivity, not a competing explanation of base mechanics.
weight_falsifiers: Bear assumptions become base case in filings (e.g. sustained volume collapse)
paths.hard_to_vary: yes: asymmetric low weight is structural

paths.label: Bull scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Upside stress probe; higher than bear because optionality archetype has skew, but still below primary paths.
weight_falsifiers: Bull growth sustained in filings for 4+ quarters without falsifier trigger

qualitative_adjustments.factor: No dated predictive attribute at spot
qualitative_adjustments.rationale: Scarcity is descriptive; no timed mispricing catalyst in base
qualitative_adjustments.falsifier: Cross-check names dated catalyst with timeline

deutsch_checks.reach: Weights encode evidence tier (A primary → D external), not fitted to hit a target IRR

synthesis.notes: Capstone IRR combining filings, segments, overlays, third-party, qualitative

context_overlay.disclaimer: Context only. Tailwinds inform stance and overlay sizing; they do not auto-inflate Lawrence base IRR. Promotion to base case requires [HUMAN REVIEW].

insider_signal.disclaimer: Context only. Insider activity informs scenario confidence and stance discussion; it does not auto-inflate Lawrence base IRR. Promotion requires [HUMAN REVIEW].

scenario_confidence.note: Scenario weights are qualitative confidence only; Lawrence base IRR unchanged.

top_dissents.label: Mohnish Pabrai
top_dissents.falsifier: dhando -> none OR net-debt/EBITDA > 3 OR bear return < -15%

lens_consensus.disclaimer: Advisory lens blend only. Does not replace Lawrence total-synthesis stance gate without [HUMAN REVIEW].
